overall.description: A truck drives through heavy snowfall at night on winding mountain roads, navigating curves and passing through multiple tunnels. The footage is from a truck simulation game, showing the first-person cabin view with active windshield wipers, dashboard instruments, and headlights illuminating the snow-covered asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain highway approaching roundabout intersection

events.description: approaching roundabout with red and white chevron direction signs
approaching tunnel entrance as road curves left

agents.ego_description: driving truck through heavy snow with windshield wipers active, navigating toward a roundabout

entered.detail: asphalt road completely covered in snow with visible tire tracks
tall pole lights illuminating the snowy highway
metal safety barriers along the road edge
red and white directional arrow signs indicating curve

segments.scene_description: The truck drives on a snow-covered mountain highway at night, with headlights cutting through the heavy snowfall. Street lights and guardrails line the road as the vehicle approaches a roundabout marked by chevron signs, then nears a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering first tunnel, transitioning from open snow to enclosed concrete passage
exiting tunnel into open mountain area with buildings visible

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel with artificial lighting reflecting off wet road surface

entered.detail: concrete portal marking the tunnel entry with snow on the approach
concrete walls and ceiling with regularly spaced overhead lights

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a concrete tunnel, leaving the falling snow behind for a brief sheltered passage. Overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt as the vehicle travels through the straight tunnel section before emerging back into the snowy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with snow banks and occasional structures

events.description: passing mountain buildings and structures on the right side of the road
navigating sharp S-curves on the snow-covered mountain pass

agents.ego_description: carefully steering through winding curves with reduced speed on slippery snow surface

entered.detail: small structures or maintenance buildings partially covered in snow
high piles of plowed snow lining the road edges

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the truck navigates a winding mountain road with high snow banks on either side. The vehicle passes some buildings on the right while maneuvering through sharp curves, with guardrails now closer to the road edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: second highway tunnel with blue road signs

events.description: entering second tunnel marked by blue directional signs
exiting second tunnel back into open snowy landscape

agents.ego_description: driving through the second tunnel section with consistent speed

entered.detail: concrete tunnel portal with blue information signs above
concrete tunnel walls with embedded lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and enters a second tunnel, passing blue road signs at the entrance. Inside, the concrete walls and overhead lighting create an enclosed environment before the vehicle exits back into the open mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: final winding mountain approach with guardrails

agents.ego_description: continuing through final series of curves on the snow-covered descent

entered.detail: continuation of snow-covered highway with visible lane markings

segments.scene_description: In the final stretch, the truck exits the second tunnel and continues along the winding mountain road. Guardrails line the curves as the vehicle progresses through the persistent snowfall, with headlights illuminating the snow-covered path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a snowy mountain landscape that alternates between open, blizzard-swept highways and sheltered concrete tunnels. It begins with the truck navigating a snow-covered road under the glow of street lights, passing chevron signs at a roundabout before gliding into the first tunnel. As the vehicle leaves the falling snow for the illuminated, wet asphalt of the passage, it soon emerges back into the night to maneuver through sharp curves flanked by high snow banks and roadside buildings. The scene then shifts as the truck passes blue road signs and enters a second enclosed tunnel, momentarily replacing the winter storm with artificial overhead lighting. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel and returns to the open mountain terrain, where the headlights cut through persistent snowfall along a winding, guardrail-lined path.
